# progress-study
# AI driven study planner
## The website where user will get the customized Ai driven study plan for them which would be executable. User can store his plan and mark as paid once he completed the plan with x days or x weeks
# How it works
## User just need to fill only 4 input field like
## Which subject, Which topic, In how much days, How much hours you will give per day

# User can save the plan generated by AI 
## User can view his own plan for future reference
